reason: Docker WebUI login page is implemented in single-file HTML UI
Login state and validation message stay local in Docker WebUI client script
Keep shared config/auth contracts explicit across Docker runtime and UI
Authentication belongs in Docker runtime boundary, not shared core logic
Login route should validate password and return consistent JSON errors
Avoid logging secrets such as the configured WebUI password
Protect Docker routes at the boundary and validate user input before mutation
Define login boundary between browser, Express routes, and Docker runtime config
